research.title: From Research Question to Scientific Workflow: Leveraging Agentic AI for Science Automation
research.summary: Scientific workflow systems automate execution -- scheduling, fault tolerance, resource management -- but not the semantic translation that precedes it. Scientists still manually convert research questions into workflow specifications, a task requiring both domain knowledge and infrastructure expert

research.title: Nemobot Games: Crafting Strategic AI Gaming Agents for Interactive Learning with Large Language Models
research.summary: This paper introduces a new paradigm for AI game programming, leveraging large language models (LLMs) to extend and operationalize Claude Shannon's taxonomy of game-playing machines. research.title: First measurement of wind line formation regions in an early O-type star
research.summary: Massive stars with their strong ionizing radiation and strong stellar winds are the key feedback agents of the universe. research.title: Task-Driven Co-Design of Heterogeneous Multi-Robot Systems
research.summary: Designing multi-agent robotic systems requires reasoning across tightly coupled decisions spanning heterogeneous domains, including robot design, fleet composition, and planning. research.title: Wave physics as a choreographic notation for partner dance
research.summary: The wave is considered a paradigm in dance and connects bodily expression with nature. research.title: CrossCommitVuln-Bench: A Dataset of Multi-Commit Python Vulnerabilities Invisible to Per-Commit Static Analysis
research.summary: We present CrossCommitVuln-Bench, a curated benchmark of 15 real-world Python vulnerabilities (CVEs) in which the exploitable condition was introduced across multiple commits - each individually benign to per-commit static analysis - but collectively critical. research.title: Machine Behavior in Relational Moral Dilemmas: Moral Rightness, Predicted Human Behavior, and Model Decisions
research.summary: Human moral judgment is context-dependent and modulated by interpersonal relationships.
